title: nephrodium noveboracense
intro: Nephrodium noveboracense, also known as the New York fern, is a species of fern native to the northeastern regions of North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium noveboracense include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Nephrodium noveboracense can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for use in traditional medicine.
